items.name_en: CELINE Fall New Arrival|CABAS THAIS Small TRIOMPHE Fabric Calfskin Bag
items.name_cn:
CELINE Fall New Arrival|CABAS THAIS Small TRIOMPHE Fabric Calfskin Bag
New ultra-gentle Triumph black fabric and calfskin mini tote
The previous version was a large tote, which was bulky. The new small tote size is very friendly for petite girls [Heart]. It also has a shoulder strap for crossbody wear, combining practicality and aesthetics.
Size: 29x16x13cm
Strap: 44cm
Model: 199162

specs.rawTitle:
CELINE Fall New Arrival|CABAS THAIS Small TRIOMPHE Fabric Calfskin Bag
New ultra-gentle Triumph black fabric and calfskin mini tote
The previous version was a large tote, which was bulky. The new small tote size is very friendly for petite girls [Heart]. It also has a shoulder strap for crossbody wear, combining practicality and aesthetics.
Size: 29x16x13cm
Strap: 44cm
Model: 199162

items.name_en: New Arrival🅰️🅰️
items.name_cn:
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
New Colors Available ~ Fresh and Elegant
Blue stripe fabric and calfskin Triumph, echoing each other to create a fresh spring/summer texture. The craftsmanship is fine, with exquisite stitching. The overall design is fresh and gentle, has capacity and looks great, and goes well with any outfit, easily switching styles, ❤️. It also has a shoulder strap for crossbody wear, combining practicality and aesthetics.
Casual style, literary fresh, Mori girl style are all great.
Capacity: No need to question, it definitely holds a lot 👍
Style No.: 199162
Size: 26×19×13

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: New Arrival AA
items.name_cn:
New Arrival AA
CE New Fabric Tote~Tech logo print, low-key and premium! Soft fabric material adds a casual vibe. Handheld or crossbody! Totes and bucket bags are definitely the kings of capacity. Perfect for office workers or girls who carry a lot of daily essentials!!
Style: Versatile and classy. Great for commuting, casual style, literary fresh look, or Mori style.
Capacity: No need to doubt, it's definitely sufficient👍
Model: 199162
Dimensions: 26×19×13

items.name_en: New Arrival🅰️🅰️
items.name_cn:
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
CABAS THAIS Small Celine Jacquard Striped Weave Handbag/Shoulder Bag/Crossbody Bag! This bag is a seasonal limited edition tote. Made of fabric material, it is more durable and comfortable than leather and straw weaving. 🧲 The bag comes with a brown adjustable cowhide shoulder strap, very practical for daily commuting and work. Amazing capacity.
Style: Versatile and comfortable, suitable for commuting and casual style.
Capacity: Unquestionable, plenty of space 👍🏻
Style No.: 199162
Dimensions: 26x19x13

items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 2026 Spring/Summer New Smile Bag.
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 2026 Spring/Summer New Smile Bag.
The It Bag from over a decade ago, the CE Smile Bag, is back......
For the CE 2026 Spring/Summer show, Michael Rider brought the decade-old, iconic "Smile Bag" back into the public eye.
Besides the narrower, longer silhouette and the frown turning into a smile, the ultra-flat Flat Cabas Smile Bag has also been released. Many different sizes and colorways are coming soon ✅
Style No.: 123963
Color: White
Dimensions: 44.5x31.5x0.5cm

items.name_en: Large 44cm New Arrival 26 Spring Series New Smile Bag 👛
items.name_cn:
Large 44cm New Arrival 26 Spring Series New Smile Bag 👛
😐 turns to 🙂, the CE Smile Bag returns refreshed!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Series!
NEW LARGE New Smile Bag
The classic from memory, returns with a fresh look!
👜 Lightweight material, modern lines
It is still that It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a simple and sleek modern temperament. The new Creative Director Michael Rider surprised everyone with the return of the "Smile Bag" at the 2026 Spring debut. The smooth, fine, and glossy leather, combined with topstitching and piping, shapes a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette. The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing the name "Smile Bag." By reinterpreting the classic design with a modern silhouette, the overall bag is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 123683
Color: Dark Brown
Dimensions: Base 44x16x30cm, Opening 69cm

items.name_en: New Arrival: CE Smile Bag for Spring/Summer 2026
items.name_cn:
New Arrival: CE Smile Bag for Spring/Summer 2026
CE Smile Bag returns with a fresh look!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Collection!
NEW LAGE
The classic memory, reborn!
Lightweight material, modern lines
Still the It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a modern, minimalist, and sharp temperament. New Creative Director Michael Rider makes a surprise return with the "Smile Bag" for the Spring/Summer 2026 debut. Smooth, fine, and lustrous leather, saddle stitching, and piping create a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette. The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing this beloved name. Reinterpreting classic design through a modern silhouette, it is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 124213
Dimensions: 36.5x12x19cm (Opening)

items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 26 Spring Collection New Smile Bag 👛
😐 turns 🙂, CE Smile Bag returns with a fresh look!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Collection!
NEW LUGGAGE New Smile Bag
The classic of memory returns with a new look!
👜Lightweight material, modern lines
Still the It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a minimalist and chic modern temperament.
At the 2026 Spring debut, Creative Director Michael Rider brought the "Smile Bag" back with a surprise.
Smooth and lustrous leather, saddle stitching and piping create a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette.
The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing the name "Smile Bag".
By reinterpreting the classic design with a modern silhouette, it is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 123693
Color: Black
Dimensions: Base 36x22x16cm
Opening 56cm
